item.title: SHE SAID WHAT?! All-Female Comedy Revue
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Punch Line Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

Doors will open one hour prior to show time. This show is 18 & over with valid, government-issued photo ID. There is a two beverage minimum per person. Cameras and video/audio recording devices are not permitted. $.25 per each ticket sold for a majority of events at Punch Line benefits Comedy Gives Back, a safety net for the comedy community. For more information, please visit www.comedygivesback.com Our events often run for multiple dates/times. Before purchasing, please ensure that you can attend the specific event, date, and time that is listed on the event page. There are no refunds/exchanges unless an event is cancelled/postponed. ⚠️ Duration is approximate — automated verification pending. item.title: Cynthia Lee Fontaine Presents: Drag Brunch at the Punch
item.description:
Saturday, June 20, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Punch Line Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

Looking for the ultimate Houston drag brunch experience? Whether you're planning a bachelorette party, a birthday celebration, or just want a daytime drag show without the late-night crowd, this is your event. Drag Brunch at The Punch is a monthly extravaganza featuring fierce performances, sassy audience games, and unforgettable live drag performances ? paired with brunch cocktails, mimosas, and bites. The perfect daytime LGBTQ event for anyone who loves fabulous entertainment before sundown. Produced by RuPaul's Drag Race fan-favorite Cynthia Lee Fontaine, each show features Houston drag queens bringing show-stopping numbers, big laughs, and serious talent. Perfect for girls' day out, gay brunch, Pride celebrations, and anyone looking for a fun Saturday activity in Houston. No late nights required ? just good drinks, great queens, and the best drag brunch ticket in town. Grab your tickets now. Please note that Cynthia will not be making an appearance. IMPORTANT TIMES: 10:30 AM BOX OFFICE OPENS SEATING BEGINS AT 11:00AM - SHOWTIME IS AT 12:00PM This show is 18 & over with valid, government-issued photo ID. Cameras and video/audio recording devices are not permitted. $.25 per each ticket sold for a majority of events at Punch Line benefits Comedy Gives Back, a safety net for the comedy community. For more information, please visit www.comedygivesback.com Our events often run for multiple dates/times. Before purchasing, please ensure that you can attend the specific event, date, and time that is listed on the event page. There are no refunds/exchanges unless an event is cancelled/postponed. ⚠️ Duration is approximate — automated verification pending. Source: https://www.ticketmaster.com/cynthia-lee-fontaine-presents-drag-brunch-houston-texas-06-20-2026/event/3A006435FE323D1A

item.title: Cynthia Lee Fontaine Presents: Drag Brunch at the Punch

Location: Punch Line Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

Looking for the ultimate Houston drag brunch experience? Whether you're planning a bachelorette party, a birthday celebration, or just want a daytime drag show without the late-night crowd, this is your event. item.title: Cynthia Lee Fontaine Presents: Drag Brunch at the Punch
item.description:
Saturday, September 19, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Punch Line Houston, 1204 Caroline Street, Houston, TX

Looking for the ultimate Houston drag brunch experience? Whether you're planning a bachelorette party, a birthday celebration, or just want a daytime drag show without the late-night crowd, this is your event. Drag Brunch at The Punch is a monthly extravaganza featuring fierce performances, sassy audience games, and unforgettable live drag performances ? paired with brunch cocktails, mimosas, and bites. The perfect daytime LGBTQ event for anyone who loves fabulous entertainment before sundown. Produced by RuPaul's Drag Race fan-favorite Cynthia Lee Fontaine, each show features Houston drag queens bringing show-stopping numbers, big laughs, and serious talent. Perfect for girls' day out, gay brunch, Pride celebrations, and anyone looking for a fun Saturday activity in Houston. No late nights required ? just good drinks, great queens, and the best drag brunch ticket in town. Grab your tickets now. Please note that Cynthia will not be making an appearance.
